action.reasoning: Observation: Best test balanced accuracy is 0.8346 with balanced softmax + EMA. Current training with more regularization (drop_path, label_smoothing, mixup) got only 0.8330 on val - worse. Analysis: Additional regularization may conflict with balanced softmax. Instead of retraining, I can try post-hoc logit adjustment at inference (sweep α in logits + α*log_freq) and τ-normalization of classifier weights. These are free improvements that don't require retraining. Decision: Write and run a sweep script to find optimal α and τ on val set, then update predict.py and submit eval.
